zh.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes於1531年出生在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭阿希特。他於1561年與Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis在英國蘇格蘭希倫德格倫 蓋瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1566年登記服兵役。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes于1531年出生在苏格兰薩瑟蘭阿希特。他于1561年与Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis在英国苏格兰希倫德格倫 蓋瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1566年登记服兵役。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Torquil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Torcall
meanings: Traditional name, originally a borrowing into Gaelic of the Old Norse personal name Þorketill, from Þorr (Thor, name of the god of thunder) + ketill ‘(sacrificial) cauldron’.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes was born in 1531, in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland. He married Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis in 1561, in Glen Garry, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1566.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes est né en 1531, à Assynt, Sutherland, Écosse. Il a épousé Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis en 1561, à Glen Garry, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1566.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes wurde 1531 in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland geboren. Er hat 1561 in Glen Garry, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1566 zum Militärdienst angemeldet.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes è nato il nel 1531 nel Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland. Lui sposato Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis nel 1561, nel Glen Garry, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1566.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewesは1531年にスコットランドススエルランドアシントで生まれた。1561年にイギリススコットランドヒグhランドグレン ガーリーでLady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1566年に兵役登録をした。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes(은)는 1531년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 아시트에서 태어났다. 그는 1561년 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 글렌 게리에서 Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes nasceu em 1531, em Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis em 1561, em Glen Garry, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1566.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Torquil Connanach MacLeod of the Lewes родился в 1531 г. в местности ассинт, сутирланд, Шотландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret MacDonald of Glengarry, Baroness of Lewis в 1561 г. в местности глен гарри, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1566 году он поступил на военную службу.
